TestCase z25Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data1, t1.data1, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data1 = follow_case_data1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n1 < 1
    if (follow_case.n1 < 1) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: apply floor to each element of data1
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n1; ++i) {
        follow_case.data1[i] = floor(follow_case.data1[i]);
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
